name: flowdoc
description: Deterministic, preset-driven flow diagrams for reporting guidelines (PRISMA 2020, CONSORT, STROBE, …)

scripts.prepare-examples: npm run build && node bin/flowdoc.mjs render examples/prisma-review.yaml -o examples/prisma-review.svg && node bin/flowdoc.mjs export examples/prisma-review.yaml --format drawio -o examples/prisma-review.drawio && node bin/flowdoc.mjs export examples/prisma-review.yaml --format mermaid -o examples/prisma-review.mmd
scripts.demo: npm run build && npm run prepare-examples && npm test
